title: [Shed]
description: Slivers of light trickle in through cracks in the ceiling and walls, casting odd shadows within this cramped interior.  A few rusty tools hang on one wall, clearly neglected for many years.

Burning torches just outside this shed allow a few slivers of light to trickle in through cracks in the ceiling and walls, casting odd shadows within this cramped interior.  A few rusty tools hang on one wall, clearly neglected for many years.

wayto.18348: ;e fput 'look tool'; sleep 0.5; fput 'pull hoe'; waitrt?; fput 'pull rake'; waitrt?; fput 'pull shovel'; waitrt?; move 'go panel'
